final_decision.exact_quote: Job listings feature has been removed following the deprecation of the Apply tab.
final_decision.response: If you are unable to see the Apply tab, please note that this feature has been removed following the deprecation of the Apply tab. You can still access coding challenges under the Prepare tab.
